instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-swapped` that swaps the values of two places, runs body, and restores both places to their original values when body exits (even on non-local exits).
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 A) (#:G2 B))
            (SETF A #:G2
                  B #:G1)
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (PROCESS))
              (SETF A #:G1
                    B #:G2)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 A) (#:G113 B))
            (SETF A #:G113
                  B #:G112)
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (PROCESS))
              (SETF A #:G112
                    B #:G113)))

--- stderr ---
